tracks.rawText: 3:39Bellv5Style: Epic, Melodic Psytrance at 148 BPM, Spiritual, driving, cinematic, Description: A sonic journey through Jewish mysticism (Kabbalah), Fusion of ancient sounds (shofar, chants) with modern psytrance, Tells a story of spiritual ascent (Merkabah) and cosmic repair (Tikkun), Song Structure & Key Sounds: Intro (0:00-1:30): Deep, meditative atmosphere, Distant, processed shofar blast, Subtle whispers in Hebrew, A deep, organic drone (Ein Sof), Build-Up (1:30-3:00): Progressive kick drum enters, Crystal arpeggios (breaking light) and atmospheric, klezmer-inspired synth strings rise, Climax/Drop (3:00-5:00): Full, intricate psytrance rhythm, The bassline should feel like a Talmudic debate (complex, conversational), Soaring, twisting leads (the "Wheels" of the divine Chariot), A processed vocal mantra: "Lo BaShamayim Hi" ("It is not in the heavens"), Breakdown (5:00-6:30): Rhythm dissolves, Sounds of rustling parchment pages, water droplets, ancient bells, A beautiful, simple flute-2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Bell

tracks.rawText: 3:38**Title: “Still Standing in My Light”**v5soulful R&B ballad inspired by Alicia Keys, emotional piano chords, live drums, gospel choir harmonies, jazzy electric bass, and warm analog tone, strong, soulful female vocals full of emotion and power — a mix between Fallin’ and Girl on Fire — singing about inner strength, rebirth, and love, dynamic, cinematic energy, uplifting outro with choir and stringsAliciake1PublishRemix
tracks.title: **Title: “Still Standing in My Light”**

tracks.rawText: 2:38Paso pensando todos los díasv5A lively corrido driven by fast-paced fingerpicking on acoustic guitar, underpinned by a bright and agile accordion weaving energetic melodies, Upright bass provides a punchy foundation, while percussion stays crisp with snappy snare, giving the arrangement relentless forward motion throughoutPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:33Paso pensando todos los díasv5A narco-corrido led by rapid-fire, virtuosic accordion lines weaving complex melodies over a steady, driving bajo sexto and tuba bass groove, Percussion is punchy, with syncopated snare fills, Horn stabs accent crucial moments, and brief accordion solos between verses intensify energyPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:53Paso pensando todos los díasv5Vals romántico latino, estilo bolero clásico de trío de guitarras, tempo lento a medio en compás 3/4, guitarras acústicas con rasgueo suave y arpegios elegantes, armonías vocales cálidas y nostálgicas, interpretación íntima y sentimental, atmósfera de serenata nocturna, melodía melancólica y apasionada, inspiración en valses y boleros tradicionales mexicanos de mediados del siglo XX1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 4:07“El Paro de Maximiliano”v5Opening with insistent accordion riffs and requinto guitar, the narcocorrido lays a driving polka rhythm over bajo sexto and tuba, Trumpets punctuate key lines, while the verses build tension with brisk percussion, The chorus surges with tight vocal harmonies and dynamic instrumental flourishes1PublishRemix
